{{Missing Info}}

= Venture to the Stars =
[[File:Venture to the Stars Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Venture to the Stars]]
Sep. 27 - Oct. 10 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=92
{{Clear}}

The player gains {{RewardIconWithText|Detector}}s every day and uses them to explore the galaxy. While exploring, the following parts are found to enhance your rocket:
* {{RewardIconWithText|Aluminum Alloy Plate}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Circuit Board}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Gear}}

The currency of this events shop is {{RewardIconWithText|Space Token}}.

This even has locked boxes that can be opened with keys. There are normal keys and rare keys. The rare keys are {{RewardIconWithText|Starlight Key}}.

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Chang'e and Laurel|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lunar Soil Specimen|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Gan Shi Star Chart|green}}

= Decoration Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Planet Model|green}} ([[Advisor Zhuge]] Decoration)

= Home Decoration Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Large Carrier Rocket|black|Home Decoration}} (Home Decoration)

= Robot Rewards = 
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Cupid|orange|Robots}}

[[Category:Events]]
